title: triticum cynosuroides
intro: Triticum cynosuroides, also known as wild einkorn, is an ancient, wild grass species closely related to domesticated einkorn wheat (Triticum monococcum). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems. Consuming wild einkorn has been reported to have various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, flour, or supplement, with some herbalists recommending it as a natural remedy for digestive issues and allergies.
